overview.short: Konetirayala Swamy Temple (also known as Venkateswara Temple) is a Hindu temple of Lord Venkateswara in the town of Keelapatla, Palamaner, Chittoor District, Andhra Pradesh, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Koneti Rayala Swamy Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Koneti Rayala Swamy Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Koneti Rayala Swamy Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tirupati Airport (94 km) and the nearest railway station is Tirupati Railway Station (83 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Koneti Rayala Swamy Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Koneti Rayala Swamy Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Koneti Rayala Swamy Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Koneti Rayala Swamy Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Koneti Rayala Swamy Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Palamaner, Penugolakala.
